message:
🐛 fix: throttle auto-qa Copilot assignments to avoid rate limiting (#2907)

Add 120-second delay between Copilot coding agent assignments in the
auto-qa issue creation loop. Rapid-fire assignments (3-5 issues in
milliseconds) hit Copilot's concurrency limits, causing silent failures.

Configurable via COPILOT_ASSIGNMENT_DELAY_S env var. A 3-issue run
now takes ~4 minutes instead of <1 second — still well within the
6-hour window between scheduled runs.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
